content.content: Romanian-born, German actress who is known for her roles in such films as Rush,The Reader, Control, and Downfall. Her family had to flee from Romania to Berlin in order to escape communism. She learned to speak German, French, Romanian, and English fluently. She married English actorSam Rileyin 2009 and the couple welcomed a son in January 2014. She played Traudl Junge, the secretary ofAdolf Hitler, in the critically acclaimed 2004 film Downfall. Swiss actorBruno Ganztook on the role of Hitler.
